name: Gum-Gum Jump Rope (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [Main] DON!! 2 (You may return the specified number of DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck.): Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less. Then, draw 1 card.[Trigger] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
